attributes.description: Alerts when the leader has more than 10 pending syncs. Replication backlog precedes unsynced followers.
attributes.name: [ZooKeeper OTel] Pending syncs buildup on leader

investigation_guide.blob:
## ZooKeeper pending syncs buildup on leader

### What fired
Leader's average `sync.pending > 10` during the window.

### Why it matters
The ZAB protocol relies on quick syncs to followers. Buildup means followers are slow or the network is degraded.

### Triage
1. Check network between leader and followers.
2. Inspect follower CPU/disk.

### Remediation
- Fix slow followers or network.

### Tuning
- 10 pending threshold.
